camp_staff_2026.page_description: Internal operations guide for organizers and volunteers of the 3rd Gangjeong Peace & Music Camp.
camp_staff_2026.hero_subtitle: 3rd Gangjeong Peace & Music Camp — "End the War!"
camp_staff_2026.private_banner_body: This is a private operations page not indexed by search engines. It contains sensitive information including personal contacts and lodging assignments. Please do not share beyond the organizing team. Letting us know your availability in advance is a great help for scheduling.
lodging_notice: Accommodation may change by day for stays of 2 or more nights. Please check your assignment carefully.
Check-in/out time is 11:00 AM. Please tidy up your bedding and room before leaving so the next guest can settle in.
A room list for the day will be posted outside each door by 11:00 AM.
camp_staff_2026.rain_note: ※ In case of rain, the event will be split across 할망물식당 and the café space simultaneously.
camp_staff_2026.schedule_note: Anyone available can join regardless of role. Please let us know your available schedule in advance! (Lead: 이상)
camp_staff_2026.timetable_rain_note: ※ The rain-day performance timetable will be shared separately.
camp_staff_2026.lodging_extra_note: ※ Separate lodging arrangements for 강가히말라야 and 삼각전파사 will be communicated directly.
market_items: Up to 15 seller teams · Cancelled in case of rain
남수 and 자이 handle seller communication and inquiries.
camp_staff_2026.market_cta_desc: If you'd like to participate as a seller, please apply via the Google Form below.
camp_staff_2026.guidelines_card_desc: Please review the behavior guidelines and reporting procedures for a safe and equal camp.
camp_staff_2026.musician_card_desc: Information for participating musicians (side programs, budget, etc.) is also available here.

tasks: 강정평화센터 cleanup, collect wooden pallets; flag prep (starting afternoon)
Scaffold, stage banner & flag installation (starting afternoon)
Sound setup, canopy installation, moving chairs/tables & supplies, space setup (starting 10:00)
Electrical equipment removal, organizing booth cleanup (immediately after end)
강정 Sports Park cleanup, accommodation cleanup, final cleanup (starting 9:00)

notes: Volunteer organization / task guideline distribution / overall communication
Ticket & T-shirt confirmation, sales & guidance (3–4 working, 1–2 resting in rotation)
Arrive 1 hour before the event · 장하나 & 윰 will brief on-site
Day 5 & 6 (1 session on Day 5, 3 sessions on Day 6)
Check arrival time with 그린씨
Day 6 & 7 (1 working, 1 resting in rotation)
Sales support (payment info, transfer confirmation, serving), dishwashing
Day 6 call time 12:00 noon · Day 7 call time 11:00 AM
Market seller communication and inquiry desk
Check musician list, distribute lanyards & water, direct to waiting area
남수 to brief 밍키 on tasks and call time
Parking guidance (2 working, 1 resting in rotation)
Call time 10:00 AM (9:00 AM on Day 7) · briefed on Day 5
Gender-neutral restroom operation & mid-event cleaning (1 working, 1 resting in rotation)
Arrive 1 hour before the event
Daily check-in/out confirmation → post room list outside doors by 11:00 AM · accommodation inquiry desk · waste sorting check
Briefed on arrival in the village
Support survivors and separate accused in cases of sexual violence
Handle general complaints and issues
Stage construction, smoking area, booth signage, equipment setup, etc.
Leave no trace

rewards: Revenue sharing — Total revenue is split equally among all participating musicians and staff (including volunteers). ※ No payment if there is no revenue (disclosed in advance)
Organizers & volunteers — Complimentary tickets and other benefits provided for each day of participation.
Accommodation & meals — Free lodging in Gangjeong village; one meal and after-party snacks provided on participation days.

staff.role: On-site Operations / Volunteer Coordination & Management / Stage & Venue Design & Production

staff.people: 타투라쿤, 그린씨, 조은, 애나, 유니타, 양상, 정훈, 버들, 타라, 찬, 자파리 3인
